perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a woman sitting on a brown leather couch wearing a grey beanie and a light purple cardigan. She gestures towards her guest, a man in a yellow jacket and black-rimmed glasses sitting next to her. (2) As the man speaks, the camera alternates between a medium shot of both characters and close-up shots of the man explaining physiognomy. The woman reacts with varied facial expressions, including surprise and laughter. (3) The man demonstrates facial traits using his hands. Toward the end, they both wave to the camera with cheerful expressions. The setting is a simple indoor studio with a white wall and a brown couch.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music plays continuously throughout the video. A high-pitched, energetic female voice introduces the topic in Mandarin. (2) A calm, professional male voice takes over, explaining face-reading traits. The volume of the vocals is high relative to the music. (3) Occasional 'ding' sound effects and playful transition noises occur when text appears on the screen. (4) Both characters speak in a friendly, conversational tone, ending with synchronized goodbye greetings.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text appears at the start: '你的另外一半是危險人物嗎？' (Is your other half a dangerous person?) with an inquisitive tone. (2) Decorative captions emphasize keywords like '海王海后的長相' (Appearance of players), '耳朵要大' (Large ears), '眼睛大' (Large eyes), and '控制慾' (Desire for control) in bold colors and various fonts. (3) Functional subtitles translate the dialogue into Traditional Chinese at the bottom of the frame.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female host and 1 male guest seated on a couch.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The female host wears a grey beanie, light purple knit cardigan, white top, and ripped light-blue jeans. The male guest wears black-rimmed glasses, a yellow zip-up jacket, a white t-shirt, and a necklace with a rectangular pendant.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor setting featuring a large tan-colored leather couch against a plain white wall.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Trait Analysis -> Summary -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed to entertain and educate the audience on traditional physiognomy (face reading) in a modern context, specifically regarding relationship red flags. By featuring an expert, it provides 'tips' for identifying potential players or difficult personalities based on facial features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style dynamic captions and sound effects.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages popular internet slang and social tropes like 'Sea King' to make traditional fortune-telling content more relatable to a younger audience.
